title: Favicon Generator
description: Upload one image locally and generate a multi-size favicon.ico, standalone PNGs, site.webmanifest, an HTML snippet, and a ZIP bundle in seconds.

upload.heading: Upload source image
upload.drop: Drop an image here or click to select
upload.hint: Supports PNG / JPG / WebP / SVG, >= 512x512 recommended
upload.invalid: Unable to read this file. Please choose a valid image.
upload.tooLarge: File too large. Please choose an image under 10MB.

options.heading: Generation options
options.backgroundHint: Transparent by default; pick a color to flatten as the background
options.maskableHint: Reserves an 80% safe area when maskable mode is on (recommended for Android adaptive icons)

preview.heading: Preview (16 / 32 / 48 / 180)
preview.empty: Multi-size previews will appear here once an image is uploaded

output.heading: Export
output.waiting: Upload a source image to enable export

notice.title: Processed locally, never uploaded
notice.description: All image processing happens in your browser via Canvas. Source images and generated outputs are not sent to any server.
